name: golang-dbus-dev
title: golang-dbus-dev
description:
Go client bindings for D-Bus
Package "dbus" is a simple library that implements native Go client bindings
for the D-Bus message bus system.
.
This package contains the source.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-dbus-dev because Go client bindings for D-Bus.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-dbus-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-dbus-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-dbus-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
